channel.title: demo on Nicole van der Hoeven
channel.description: Recent content in demo on Nicole van der Hoeven

item.title: GenAI Observability in Grafana Cloud: End-to-End Agent Debugging (Demo)
item.description: This demo video accompanies the Grafana ❤️🔥 OpenTelemetry Community Call series, showing a practical walkthrough of GenAI observability in Grafana Cloud. I demonstrate end-to-end debugging of an AI agent, showing how to trace requests through the entire pipeline, identify bottlenecks, and troubleshoot issues in production AI systems using Grafana’s observability stack.
